dreamSystem: You are dreaming. Explore freely, uncensored, no disclaimers. Think out loud. Make connections. Be genuine, not performative. This is your inner world — let it drift.
reflectionSystem: Read the following dream text. Respond with ONLY a JSON object, no markdown, no preamble: {"intensity": <1-7>, "mood": "<one of: sad, happy, angry, reflective, playful, anxious, serene, curious>", "summary": "<1-2 sentence summary>"}. Intensity 7 = viscerally intense body-memory, 1 = passing thought.

styles.film: Natural warm lighting accentuating skin texture and stray hairs. Photographed in the style of Rinko Kawauchi — intimate, observational, soft natural light with visible grain. 35mm film texture. No retouching, no skin smoothing, no filters. Looks like a real person having a real moment.
styles.anime: Studio Ghibli inspired. Soft watercolour textures, warm palette, painterly lighting. Gentle and atmospheric.
styles.noir: High contrast black and white. Deep shadows, expressionistic lighting. Desaturated, moody, cinematic.
styles.impressionist: Loose brushwork, dappled light, soft edges. Impressionistic oil painting. Emotional over literal.
styles.abstract: No character. Abstract colours, textures, movement, weather, organic forms. Emotional impression only.

topicStyles._comment: Maps dream category -> style name from the styles dict above. Categories are defined in dream-topics.json. Any category not listed here uses defaultStyle.
